item.title: Enjoy this dose of wholesome. It was one of the few good things that came out of the tire fire that was 2020.
item.dc:creator: trustfallaccident

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
*window
not wrong?
mmm hmm
i have no
what are you doing, step can!!??!
but really who hasn't done this at least once
yes
finally
what else should someone draw? i know what happened, good enough
ok then
anyone know where this station is?
looks like a reticulated python
*sigh* i'm in..
sorry
wait what
can confirm
ahh, that old chestnut
that’s it for me. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Building fish tower in a pond
item.dc:creator: sophieone

item.title: Wonka Ripoff PART THREE!
item.description: Good for her for doing her best for the kids! Remember, the “actors” also got scammed when they answered the Now Hiring ad. #mildly_amusing #willy_wonka #aiart #fraud
item.dc:creator: ridureyu

item.title: All About that Bass
item.description: Actor Daniel Durant https://www.instagram.com/danielndurant --- FP Edit: Any imgurians in or near Western Oregon looking for an adorable user-tested void kitty (with THUMBS OMG!)? Today's your lucky day coz @hetherweaversmagic has just the boy for you: https://imgur.com/gallery/FiAc94m And he really could use a good human right about now.
item.dc:creator: ParallelParkingInABurka

item.title: Humanity at its best folks! My heart!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Stolen therapy memes
item.dc:creator: beejohnson

item.title: Images of Note: Jinux
item.description:
GET THAT VIT D!
Hey Cishets, you okay?
BILLIONS MUST TRY!
Ok but a Moorland like in Scotland is where you meet the Devil or perhaps make a speech about how it's shite being Scottish.
I feel personally attacked
HELL YEAH MINT
Why does this make sense
I love the whole "Mechanicus loves toasters" thing
Why tho
I love how this happened in Glasgow, I could've gotten a train and watched this unfold live.
This is why he puts St. Peter on the Gate.
Jinux. Jux if you will. Jnu/Jinux if you are so inclined.
:(
ALL HAIL
:D
Never change, Glasgow
creechur
owo
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Happy Rebirth Day!
item.description: Final fantasy Rebirth is out today! More of what I do here: https://www.instagram.com/daemeryss

item.title: "If he Pledges, he Pledges."
item.description: With everything going on this week, you may have missed the legendary actor and philanthropist, Dolph Lundgren, receiving his official citizenship to the United States. Well earned, if I do say so myself.
item.dc:creator: MayMyEnemiesLiveLong

item.title: Your shy gal made some shy guys!
item.description:
3D printed some red and green Shy Guys!
Love the dopey little face option
Also doubles as a storage container! Designed by Pla-n-pa. Printed on an FLsunV400 Sadly they are not $11.99
item.dc:creator: vudumommajuju

item.title: Celebrated her actual birthday day
item.description: Spent the day celebrating my daughter on her actual birthday. I still make her do this every leap year. ???

item.title: Back in the sixties my parents would watch reruns of this stuff which I thought was trite and corny.
